## Summary

- [ ] Briefly describe what changed and why

## Design System Checklist (PayEvo)

- [ ] UI uses `PayEvo Design System/colors_and_type.css` tokens (no ad hoc palette/spacing/radius)
- [ ] Typography follows Open Sans weights 300/400/600/700
- [ ] Components reuse workspace kit patterns where applicable (`TopHeader`, `Sidebar`, `Btn`, `Badge`, `HeroBand`)
- [ ] Icons/logos follow PayEvo asset guidance (Lucide mapping or approved FA Pro setup)
- [ ] Copy tone is practical, sentence case UI text, Title Case button labels, no emoji

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint:styles`
- [ ] `npm run test:visual`
